SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.expander

Class RadialExpanderGeometryMap

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.expander.RadialExpanderGeometryMap
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class RadialExpanderGeometryMap extends Object implements Serializable
Geometry-based performance-map generator for a 90° radial-inflow (IFR) turbo-expander.

Commercial turbomachinery design codes (AxSTREAM, Concepts NREC) generate performance maps from blade geometry using mean-line and through-flow methods. NeqSim is primarily map-driven; this class closes part of that gap by producing a physically-shaped ExpanderChartKhader from a small set of mean-line geometric inputs. It is a preliminary mean-line model intended for concept screening and to seed a digitised map when no OEM curve is available, not a replacement for a full blade-to-blade or CFD design code.

The efficiency model is a classic mean-line loss accounting for a 90° IFR turbine (Dixon & Hall, Fluid Mechanics and Thermodynamics of Turbomachinery; Whitfield & Baines, Design of Radial Turbomachines). Working with the velocity ratio

$$ \nu = \frac{U_2}{c_0}, \qquad c_0 = \sqrt{2\,\Delta h_{0s}} $$

and an absolute rotor-inlet flow angle \( \alpha_2 \) measured from the meridional (radial) direction, the nominal (zero-incidence) velocity ratio is

$$ \nu_{opt} = \sqrt{1-R}\,\sin\alpha_2 $$

where \(R\) is the stage degree of reaction. The total-to-static efficiency over a sweep of velocity ratio is then

$$ \eta_{ts}(\nu) = 1 - \Big[ f_i(\nu_{opt}-\nu)^2 + \zeta_n(1-R) + \zeta_r\big(r_r^2\nu^2 + (1-R)\cos^2\alpha_2\big) + (1-R)\cos^2\alpha_2 \Big] $$

with incidence-loss factor \(f_i\), nozzle loss coefficient \(\zeta_n\), rotor loss coefficient \(\zeta_r\) and exit/inlet radius ratio \(r_r = r_3/r_2\). The incidence term produces the characteristic efficiency peak near \(\nu_{opt}\approx 0.7\); the friction term shifts the peak slightly below \(\nu_{opt}\); the constant nozzle/exit terms cap the peak below unity.

Inlet-guide-vane (IGV) modulation is represented by supplying one nozzle angle per IGV position; closing the vanes increases \(\alpha_2\) (more swirl) which shifts \(\nu_{opt}\) and the peak efficiency. The available isentropic stage head drop is assumed constant across the velocity-ratio sweep at a given IGV (it is fixed by the imposed pressure ratio, not by the machine), and is fed to the chart in kJ/kg where ExpanderChartKhader rescales it for the actual fluid sound speed.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private double
    degreeOfReaction
    Stage degree of reaction (0 = impulse, 0.5 = 50% reaction).
    private double
    designHeadDropKjPerKg
    Reference design isentropic stage head drop in kJ/kg at full IGV opening.
    private double
    impellerOuterDiameter
    Impeller (rotor inlet) outer diameter in m.
    private double
    incidenceLossFactor
    Incidence-loss factor applied to the off-nominal tangential relative velocity.
    (package private) static final org.apache.logging.log4j.Logger
    logger
    Logger object for class.
    private double
    maxVelocityRatio
    Highest velocity ratio to evaluate on each generated curve.
    private double
    minVelocityRatio
    Lowest velocity ratio to evaluate on each generated curve.
    private double
    nozzleLossCoefficient
    Nozzle (stator) kinetic-energy loss coefficient.
    private int
    pointsPerCurve
    Number of velocity-ratio samples per generated curve.
    private double
    radiusRatio
    Exit/inlet radius ratio r3/r2 (dimensionless).
    private SystemInterface
    referenceFluid
    Reference fluid used to normalise the generated map (may be null).
    private double
    rotorLossCoefficient
    Rotor relative kinetic-energy loss coefficient.
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
    Serialization version UID.

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RadialExpanderGeometryMap()
    Default constructor using representative cryogenic turbo-expander geometry.
    RadialExpanderGeometryMap(double impellerOuterDiameter, double radiusRatio, double degreeOfReaction)
    Constructs a generator for a specific rotor geometry.

  • Constructor Details

    • RadialExpanderGeometryMap

      public RadialExpanderGeometryMap()
      Default constructor using representative cryogenic turbo-expander geometry.

    • RadialExpanderGeometryMap

      public RadialExpanderGeometryMap(double impellerOuterDiameter, double radiusRatio, double degreeOfReaction)
      Constructs a generator for a specific rotor geometry.
      Parameters:
      impellerOuterDiameter - the rotor inlet (tip) diameter in m
      radiusRatio - the exit/inlet radius ratio r3/r2 (0..1)
      degreeOfReaction - the stage degree of reaction (0..1)

  • Method Details

    • generateChart

      public ExpanderChartKhader generateChart(double[] igvPositions, double[] nozzleAngleDeg)
      Generates an ExpanderChartKhader from blade geometry for the supplied IGV schedule.
      Parameters:
      igvPositions - IGV positions (fraction of maximum area, 0..1), strictly increasing
      nozzleAngleDeg - absolute rotor-inlet flow angle (from the meridional/radial direction) in degrees, one value per IGV position; larger angles correspond to more closed vanes
      Returns:
      a populated ExpanderChartKhader ready for use by a turbo-expander model
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the inputs are null, empty or of mismatched length, or if any nozzle angle is outside the open interval (0, 90) degrees

    • nominalVelocityRatio

      public double nominalVelocityRatio(double nozzleAngleDeg)
      Computes the nominal (zero-incidence) velocity ratio for a given nozzle angle.
      Parameters:
      nozzleAngleDeg - absolute rotor-inlet flow angle from the meridional direction in degrees
      Returns:
      the nominal velocity ratio U/C at peak efficiency
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the angle is not in the open interval (0, 90) degrees

    • clampUnit

      private double clampUnit(double value)
      Clamps a value to the closed unit interval [0, 1].
      Parameters:
      value - the value to clamp
      Returns:
      the clamped value

    • setImpellerOuterDiameter

      public void setImpellerOuterDiameter(double impellerOuterDiameter)
      Sets the rotor inlet (tip) diameter.
      Parameters:
      impellerOuterDiameter - the rotor inlet diameter in m (must be positive)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the diameter is not positive

    • setRadiusRatio

      public void setRadiusRatio(double radiusRatio)
      Sets the exit/inlet radius ratio r3/r2.
      Parameters:
      radiusRatio - the radius ratio in the open interval (0, 1)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the ratio is not in (0, 1)

    • setDegreeOfReaction

      public void setDegreeOfReaction(double degreeOfReaction)
      Sets the stage degree of reaction.
      Parameters:
      degreeOfReaction - the degree of reaction in the half-open interval [0, 1)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the reaction is not in [0, 1)

    • setNozzleLossCoefficient

      public void setNozzleLossCoefficient(double nozzleLossCoefficient)
      Sets the nozzle (stator) kinetic-energy loss coefficient.
      Parameters:
      nozzleLossCoefficient - the nozzle loss coefficient (must be non-negative)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the coefficient is negative

    • setRotorLossCoefficient

      public void setRotorLossCoefficient(double rotorLossCoefficient)
      Sets the rotor relative kinetic-energy loss coefficient.
      Parameters:
      rotorLossCoefficient - the rotor loss coefficient (must be non-negative)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the coefficient is negative

    • setIncidenceLossFactor

      public void setIncidenceLossFactor(double incidenceLossFactor)
      Sets the incidence-loss factor applied to the off-nominal tangential relative velocity.
      Parameters:
      incidenceLossFactor - the incidence-loss factor (must be non-negative)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the factor is negative

    • setDesignHeadDropKjPerKg

      public void setDesignHeadDropKjPerKg(double designHeadDropKjPerKg)
      Sets the reference design isentropic stage head drop at full IGV opening.
      Parameters:
      designHeadDropKjPerKg - the design head drop in kJ/kg (must be positive)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the head drop is not positive

    • setVelocityRatioRange

      public void setVelocityRatioRange(double minVelocityRatio, double maxVelocityRatio)
      Sets the velocity-ratio sweep range used when generating curves.
      Parameters:
      minVelocityRatio - the lowest velocity ratio (must be positive and below the maximum)
      maxVelocityRatio - the highest velocity ratio (must exceed the minimum)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the range is invalid

    • setPointsPerCurve

      public void setPointsPerCurve(int pointsPerCurve)
      Sets the number of velocity-ratio samples per generated curve.
      Parameters:
      pointsPerCurve - the number of points (must be at least 3)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fewer than three points are requested

    • setReferenceFluid

      public void setReferenceFluid(SystemInterface referenceFluid)
      Sets the reference fluid used to normalise the generated map.
      Parameters:
      referenceFluid - the reference fluid (may be null to skip composition correction)

    • getImpellerOuterDiameter

      public double getImpellerOuterDiameter()
      Gets the rotor inlet (tip) diameter.
      Returns:
      the impeller outer diameter in m

    • getRadiusRatio

      public double getRadiusRatio()
      Gets the exit/inlet radius ratio.
      Returns:
      the radius ratio r3/r2

    • getDegreeOfReaction

      public double getDegreeOfReaction()
      Gets the stage degree of reaction.
      Returns:
      the degree of reaction
